exclusion_result.name: Driving without a valid and effective driving licence
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: There is no indication that the driver of the insured vehicle was unlicensed.

exclusion_result.name: Consequential or indirect loss
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The claim may involve indirect losses due to the accident, such as loss of use of the vehicle.

exclusion_result.name: War, invasion and nuclear risk
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: This exclusion does not appear to apply as the incident is a road accident.

exclusion_result.name: Driving under influence of alcohol, drugs or intoxicants
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: There is no information provided about the driver's sobriety at the time of the accident.

exclusion_result.name: Damage occurring outside the geographical coverage area (India)
exclusion_result.clause_ref: Policy Schedule — Geographical Area of Cover
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident occurred within India, so this exclusion is likely not applicable.

exclusion_result.name: Vehicle driven by person not authorised by insured
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: It is unclear if the driver of the insured vehicle was authorized by the insured.

exclusion_result.name: Use of vehicle beyond the limitations of use stated in the policy
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident description does not clarify if the vehicle was used in accordance with policy limitations.

exclusion_result.name: Loss or damage intentionally caused by the insured
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: There is no evidence suggesting that the insured intentionally caused the damage.

waiting_period.note: Waiting period has elapsed. Policy has been in force for 783 days at the incident date.

claims_history.ncb_discrepancy: NCB is 20% on policy but 1 recent claim(s) show ncb_impact = TRUE. Verify whether NCB was protected via NCB_PROTECT add-on.

triggered_conditions.label: High-Value Claim
triggered_conditions.trigger: IDV Rs.780,000 > Rs.5,00,000 AND incident type is ACCIDENT_WITH_THIRD_PARTY_INJURY
triggered_conditions.adjuster_instruction: Refer to senior claims manager before proceeding.

triggered_conditions.label: Third-Party Bodily Injury Reported
triggered_conditions.adjuster_instruction: Refer to senior claims manager. Do not make any liability statement to claimant. Legal exposure.

triggered_conditions.label: Late FNOL — Over 7 Days
triggered_conditions.trigger: FNOL received 28 days after incident date
triggered_conditions.adjuster_instruction: Request written explanation from claimant. Refer to senior.
